## Use Case

Describe the workflow or need behind the request.

## Desired Capability

Describe what you would like the app to support.

## Alternatives

Is there a workaround today, such as manually running SSH commands, using SSH Config, or another tool?

## Safety Boundary

If the request involves SSH configuration, network topology, or real services, please use sanitized examples.
